name: pycaptcha-guard

metadata.name: pycaptcha-guard
metadata.summary: Solve any kind of captcha like human

documentation: <!-- ____pycaptcha-guard____ -->

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the nopechaGoogleReCaptcha class.

Args:
    driver (WebDriver): The WebDriver object for interacting with the web browser.
    key (str): The key for accessing the nopecha API.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.recaptcha_solution
documentation:
This function solves the reCAPTCHA challenge by clicking the checkbox, completing the captcha, and returning the result.

Returns:
    bool: False if the reCAPTCHA challenge is successfully solved, True otherwise otherwise.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.click_captcha_checkbox
documentation: Clicks the reCAPTCHA checkbox to verify the user's action.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.get_recaptcha_text_instructions
documentation:
Returns:
    str: The text instructions for completing the reCAPTCHA.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.complete_captcha
documentation:
Completes the captcha challenge using the provided parameters.

Args:
    iframe measures (list, required): List of measures of iframe's x-axis and y-axis and top height of browser. 
    counter (int, optional): The number of the captcha challenge. Defaults to 1.
    image_link (str, optional): The URL of the captcha image. Defaults to None.
    all_imgs_list (list, optional): List of all captcha image URLs. Defaults to [].

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.nopecha_captcha
documentation:
This function uses the nopecha API to solve the captcha challenge.

Args:
    text (str): The captcha challenge text.
    unique_image_links (List[str]): List of unique image URLs.
    grid (str): The grid size of the captcha challenge.

Returns:
    List[int]: List of grid indices to click on.
    List[bool]: List of boolean values indicating whether to click on each grid index.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.google_recaptcha.nopechaGoogleReCaptcha.click_captcha_image
documentation:
This function will click on the captcha images by finding its xpath and element through grid_click_array.

Args:
    grid_click_array (List[int]): List of numbers which are returned from the nopecha key.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.textcaptcha.nopechaTextCaptcha.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the nopechaTextCaptcha class.

Args:
    driver (WebDriver): The WebDriver object for interacting with the web browser.
    key (str): The key for accessing the nopecha API.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.textcaptcha.nopechaTextCaptcha.textcaptcha_solution
documentation:
Solves the text captcha challenge by repeatedly fetching the captcha image, 
obtaining the solution using the nopecha API, and filling the input field with the solution.

Returns:
    bool: True if the text captcha challenge is successfully solved, False otherwise.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.textcaptcha.nopechaTextCaptcha.get_textcaptcha_params
documentation:
Retrieves the URL of the text captcha image.

Returns:
    str: The URL of the text captcha image.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.textcaptcha.nopechaTextCaptcha.get_captcha_solution
documentation:
Retrieves the solution for the captcha challenge using the provided image source.

Args:
    image_src (str): The URL of the captcha image.

Returns:
    str: The solution for the captcha challenge.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.nopecha_solution.textcaptcha.nopechaTextCaptcha.fill_input_field
documentation:
Fills the input field with the provided solution for the text captcha challenge.

Args:
    solution (str): The solution for the text captcha challenge.

Returns:
    bool: False if the solution is successfully entered, True otherwise.

modules.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page
documentation: Standard library imports

classes.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage.__init__
documentation: This function is called every time a new object of the base class is created

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage.enter_text
documentation: Performs text entry of the passed in text, in a web element whose locator is passed to it

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage.press_enter_on_element
documentation:
Take the element and press enter in that element

Args:
    locator (Tuple[str, str]): Element locator to perform actions

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage.click_captcha
documentation: Performs click on captcha web element whose locator is passed to it

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage.move_mouse_to_captcha_element
documentation:
Move the mouse to a random location within a WebElement.

Parameters:
- `element`: a Selenium WebElement
- `iframe measure`: iframe axis location for exact mouse movement

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.base_page.BasePage.get_frame_axis
documentation: Get the locations of axis of the iframe and windows top bar height
Base class to initialize the base page that will be called from all pages

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.textcaptcha.capsolverTextCaptcha.__init__
documentation:
Initializes the capsolverTextCaptcha class.

Args:
    driver (WebDriver): The WebDriver object for interacting with the web browser.
    key (str): The key for accessing the capsolver API.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.textcaptcha.capsolverTextCaptcha.textcaptcha_solution
documentation:
Solves the text captcha challenge by repeatedly fetching the captcha image, 
obtaining the solution using the capsolver API, and filling the input field with the solution.

Returns:
    bool: True if the text captcha challenge is successfully solved, False otherwise.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.textcaptcha.capsolverTextCaptcha.get_textcaptcha_params
documentation:
Retrieves the URL of the text captcha image and encode it in Base64 str.

Returns:
    str: Encoded STR of the image.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.textcaptcha.capsolverTextCaptcha.get_captcha_solution
documentation:
Retrieves the solution for the captcha challenge using the provided image endcoded STR.

Args:
    image_encoded_str (str): The endcoded STR of captcha image.

Returns:
    str: The solution for the captcha challenge.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.textcaptcha.capsolverTextCaptcha.fill_input_field
documentation:
Fills the input field with the provided solution for the text captcha challenge.

Args:
    solution (str): The solution for the text captcha challenge.

Returns:
    bool: False if the solution is successfully entered, True otherwise.

Initializes the capsolverGoogleReCaptcha class.

documentation:
This function solves the reCAPTCHA challenge by clicking the checkbox, completing the captcha, and returning the result.

Returns:
    bool: False if the reCAPTCHA challenge is successfully solved, True otherwise otherwise.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.google_recaptcha.capsolverGoogleReCaptcha.click_captcha_checkbox
documentation: Clicks the reCAPTCHA checkbox to verify the user's action.

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.google_recaptcha.capsolverGoogleReCaptcha.complete_captcha
documentation:
Completes the captcha challenge using the provided parameters.

Args:
    iframe measures (list, required): List of measures of iframe's x-axis and y-axis and top height of browser. 
    counter (int, optional): The number of the captcha challenge. Defaults to 1.
    image_link (str, optional): The URL of the captcha image. Defaults to None.

documentation:
This function will click on the captcha images by finding its xpath and element through grid_click_array.

Args:

methods.name: pycaptcha_guard.capsolver_solution.google_recaptcha.capsolverGoogleReCaptcha.capsolver_captcha
documentation:
This function sends the captcha image to the capsolver API and returns the solution.

Args:
    text (str): The text instructions for completing the reCAPTCHA.
    image_url (str): The URL of the captcha image.

Returns:
    solution: The solution returned by the capsolver API.

documentation:
Returns:
    str: The text instructions for completing the reCAPTCHA.
